PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. THAT PLAINTIFF PETER SZE'S CLAIM IS DENIED AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS, INCLUDING SCOTT DANTE CAMPRA-BRANTLEY, ERWIN SANDJAYA, AND BERRY BERRY. THAT DEFENDANT AND CROSS-COMPLAINANT SCOTT DANTE CAMPRA-BRANTLEY SHALL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANTS AND CROSS-DEFENDANTS ERWIN SANDJAYA, AND BERRY BERRY THE SUM OF $3,300.00. EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS OF SUIT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
